title: Sweet Light Argentinian Gorgonzola Pizza
description: A light and energizing pizza featuring the sweetness of gorgonzola dolce and the savory flavor of bonito, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Homemade pizza dough
ingredients.notes: store-bought dough is fine too, but homemade is better!

ingredients.name: Fresh arugula
ingredients.notes: peppery and perfect for this pizza!

instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet or pizza stone.
Spread the gorgonzola dolce over the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the bonito flakes and arugula over the gorgonzola.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Crack the egg into a small bowl and whisk it lightly. Brush the egg wash over the edges of the crust to give it a golden brown finish.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
